title.en: The Celestial Star Demon Lord said respectfully.

content.en:
"Lord Darkblood!"

The Celestial Star Demon Lord said respectfully.

"Celestial Star Demon Lord, you go to the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, attack an Innate Origin Domain, destroy it, and also exterminate all the living beings within it!" commanded the Dark Blood Demon Venerable.

"Lord Dark Blood Demon Venerable, this is a direct attack on the Innate Origin Domain......"

He was a little scared.

Could it be that Lord Dark Blood Demon Venerable wants to sacrifice him, but although he is only a demon lord, his status in the Demon Gu lineage is not low!

"Don't worry, this Demon Venerable is not for you to be sent to death!" "The Dark Blood Demon Venerable guessed the thoughts of the Heavenly Star Demon Lord, so he said: "This Demon Venerable just asked you to destroy a small Innate Origin Domain, you should know the things of the Legend Realm, Ye Tian of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance is too demonic, but there are more clones, so let you destroy the Innate Origin Domain where he is located, maybe kill his body, and he will really die." In addition, this demon will give you life-saving things, which will allow you to escape. "

Wow!

A leaf appeared in front of the Celestial Star Demon Lord.

"This is the Extreme Dao Star Leaf, it is a treasure refined by this Demon Venerable, and it is a treasure of the second sequence of Supreme Dao rules, which can make you shuttle away in an instant, even the ordinary elders of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance may not be able to catch you. Besides, you are only destroying an Innate Origin Domain, and it is also an Innate Origin Domain in a remote area, it is unlikely that a Patriarch will take action to suppress you!"

The Darkblood Demon Lord said.

"Lord Dark Blood Demon Venerable, I will definitely handle this matter!"

The Celestial Star Demon Lord replied.

......

Winter Night's Fortress.

The Celestial Star Demon Lord was shrouded in darkness, as if he had merged with the Void Realm, and he slowly approached the Winter Night Fortress.

"An ordinary fortress, with my strength, I can break it in an instant!"

The Celestial Star Demon Lord said secretly.

Moreover, with the formation and strength of the Winter Night Fortress, he couldn't be found at all.

Rumble!!!

The Celestial Star Demon took the initiative.

He struck the Winter Night Fortress with a blow that terrified all the Supreme Dao realms throughout the Winter Night Fortress.

"This is an attack from the Legendary Dao Realm, and it's not an attack from the Ordinary Legendary Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian sensed it.

Such an attack is enough to kill him in an instant, and it is more powerful than the strongest legendary-level creatures, I don't know how many times.

However, he did not panic.

Because the Winter Night Fortress also has the Sioux Soho town.

Su Ho Nai is a strong man second only to the patriarch, so he is naturally not afraid of such an attack.

......

"The Heavenly Star Demon Lord of the Ancient Vein of the Void Demon Demon is not small!"

Soho opened his eyes, his figure disappeared in an instant, and he appeared outside the Winter Night Fortress, and a white right hand easily smashed the attack of the Celestial Star Demon Lord, and immediately hit the Celestial Star Demon Lord.

"Sioux Soho, why is she here?"

The Celestial Star Demon Lord was frightened and immediately urged the Extreme Dao Star Leaf.

But because the distance was too fast, when the Extreme Dao Star Leaf was activated, he had already been hit.

His body was shattered, and the remnants of his body were sent away by the Extreme Dao Star Leaf.

Soho didn't chase and kill, and he couldn't chase and kill, but the Celestial Star Demon Lord had been severely injured by her, and it would be difficult for her to recover for a long time.

Somewhere in the void.

Extreme Dao Xingye appeared with a part of the remnants of the Celestial Star Demon Lord, and the remnants of the body squirmed, gradually turning into a complete Celestial Star Demon Lord, but he was now very weak and in a state of heavy damage.

He continued to flee, and soon returned to the Mogu lineage.

"Lord Dark Blood Demon Venerable, the mission failed, the Winter Night Fortress has the Su Ho of the Sioux clan in charge, and I was almost killed!"

The Celestial Star Demon Lord reluctantly spoke.

"Waste! Send me back the Extreme Dao Star Leaf!"

The Dark Blood Demon Venerable said angrily.

After such an incident, the plan to destroy the Winter Night Fortress was suspended.

With Soho in charge, unless a Supreme Dao Void Demon Venerable is dispatched, there is no hope of success, but this kind of existence can't be easily moved, and if a big war breaks out, this kind of existence will also fall.

No matter which Demon Venerable it is, he doesn't dare to take risks!

So, for the time being, I had to give up.

......

"Thank you, Elder Soho!"

Ye Tian came to thank Soho.

This time, it also made him know that his strength was not strong enough to be too arrogant.

"It's nothing, I'm just ordered to guard here!"

Soho said lightly.

Subsequently, Su He continued to cultivate, and Ye Tian also went back.

"You have to comprehend the rules of the second sequence of supreme paths as soon as possible, so that you can transform your strength, and you can easily kill the strongest legendary-level creatures in the legendary realm and get more supreme legendary blood. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Thereupon.

He began to comprehend the rules of the second sequence of the supreme path.

With the help of the second sequence of Supreme Dao rule items, although the sequelae were very serious, and a replica body fell almost every once in a while, but after consulting again and again, he finally comprehended the second sequence of Supreme Dao rules.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian's breath seemed to be about to transform, and his strength skyrocketed.

At this moment, he is much stronger than before.

Even the strongest legendary creatures are nothing in his eyes.

......

Legends.

Ye Tian was ready to attack and kill the third supreme legendary-level creature, this time the target was the nine-colored Gu Peng, this supreme legendary-level creature was more powerful, more powerful than the thousand-blooded golden ape and the eight-winged golden cicada.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not choose it before.

But now, he doesn't care who he chooses.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the territory of the Nine Colored Gu Peng.

When he appeared here, he didn't hide his breath, and the aura explosion directly attracted the Nine Colored Gu Peng.

Rumble!!!!!

The nine-colored Gu Peng descended, and the nine-colored light brushed in, which was enough to annihilate a top nine-fold Dao realm in an instant.

However.

Ye Tian used the second sequence of supreme rules to protect himself, no matter how the Nine Colored Gu Peng attacked, he couldn't annihilate him.

"It's my turn!"

Ye Tian shot out and stabbed it with one shot.

With the blessing of the second sequence of supreme rules, the power of this gun is extremely terrifying.

The proud body of the Nine Colors Gu Peng's supreme legend couldn't be stopped at all, and it was pierced by a blow.

With just one blow, the Nine Colors Gu Peng was hit hard.

"It's too weak!"

Ye Tian kept attacking, and soon killed the Nine Colored Gu Peng.

"Take it away!"

He took the corpse of the Nine Colored Gu Peng, and then went to kill the fourth Supreme Legendary creature.

Not long after, the fourth supreme legendary-level creature, the Night Ancient Lizard, was also killed by Ye Tian.

In a short period of time, a supreme legendary-level creature was killed by Ye Tian.

In the end, there was only one legendary creature left, and it was also the oldest legendary creature of the legendary class, the Ancient Beginning Bird, and the strength of this legendary creature was terrifying, but it was not too exaggerated.

It's just that it's almost invincible in its own lair and can't be killed at all.

It's like the legendary creature nest of the Ancient Giant Bird in the Lost Domain, the Ancient Giant Bird stays in the nest, almost invincible.

As for the ancient bird, it has been staying in its nest and sleeping, and it does not go out, so it cannot be killed at all.

"Forget it, that's it, anyway, my Supreme Legendary Blood is enough, and then I will kill a batch of Legendary-level creatures, but I can't kill them all, I have to leave a little for the Supreme Dao Void Demon and the other Nine Supreme Dao Realms, otherwise the major forces will have to trouble me!"

Ye Tian muttered.
